sections.paragraph:
or סֶגֶן only in pl. סְגָנִים prop. a substitute, deputy (of a prince); hence a prefect, a governor (i.q. Arab., Pers. شِحْنَهَ the letters ח and ג being interchanged).

(1) a magistrate of the Babylonians, Jer 51:23, 28 Jer 51:28, 57 Jer 51:57 Eze 23:6, 12 Eze 23:12, 23 Eze 23:23, compare Isa 41:25, see Ch. No. 1.

(2) used of the chiefs and rulers of the people of Jerusalem in the time of Ezra and Nehemiah, Ezr 9:2 Neh 2:16 4:8 , 13 5:7 7:5 12:40 .
